# Ezvor

> Free AI-powered career platform for students and professionals — unified roadmaps and skill graphs, live opportunities, a DSA arena, an online compiler, free resources, and an AI advisor. Covers opportunities like GSoC, LFX, ICPC, and Meta Hacker Cup.

## Pages
- [Dashboard](/): Overview, featured opportunities, and quick AI ask.
- [Opportunities](/opportunities): Live jobs plus curated programs and contests across open source, hackathons, internships, scholarships, and fellowships.
- [Roadmaps & Graphs](/roadmaps): Interactive skill graphs and step-by-step checklists for every IT domain, plus AI-generated personalized paths.
- [EzCode](/playground): LeetCode-style arena — open any of 3,977 problems in-app (no redirect), write and run in a polished editor, with verified auto-judging on curated problems and topic-wise / company-wise practice.
- [Compiler](/compiler): Online multi-language IDE to write, compile, and run code.
- [Problem Catalog](/problems): All LeetCode problems with free company lists.
- [Resources](/resources): Hand-picked free learning resources.
- [AI Advisor](/advisor): Chat-based AI career advisor.
